data.title: K Wave Media Reports Strong Momentum Across Film and Drama IP Portfolio, Highlighting Breakout Box Office Success and Cannes Recognition
data.description: "Recently, the South Korean film "Whispering Water" dominated the box office, marking a significant achievement with impressive numbers in attendance. Additionally, the film "Dora" has been selected to feature at the prestigious Cannes Directors' Fortnight, gaining global recognition. Furthermore, the highly anticipated debut of "The Scarecrow" on television is expected to draw in a large audience for its broadcast premiere."

data.title: ECARX Holdings Announces Lone Fønss Schrøder as Chairperson of the Board
data.description: Global mobility tech provider, ECARX Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: ECX), made a significant move in enhancing corporate governance and expanding globally with the appointment of Lone Fønss Schrøder as Chairperson. The announcement was made in London on April 16, 2026. This strategic decision aims to strengthen operations and drive the company's expansion plans.

data.title: XPENG Publishes 2025 Environmental, Social and Governance Report
data.description: XPeng Inc., a prominent global AI mobility technology company, revealed the publication of its 2025 Environmental, Social and Governance Report. This report provides insights into the company's sustainability efforts and practices. XPeng is listed on the NYSE as XPEV and on the HKEX as 9868.

data.title: Kering partners with ICCF for flagship brand ICICLE, acquires minority stake in the company.
data.description: In recent updates, it has been reported that the number of new COVID-19 cases has increased by over 2,000 in the past 24 hours. The total number of active cases now stands at approximately 15,000. Additionally, the number of recoveries has also seen a significant rise, with over 1,500 individuals having recovered from the virus. Sadly, the death toll has climbed to nearly 500. These numbers reflect the ongoing challenges posed by the pandemic, emphasizing the need for continued vigilance and adherence to safety measures.

data.title: PepsiCo, PPG Industries And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Thursday
data.description: This morning, U.S. stock futures are up, and the focus is on key stocks. PepsiCo Inc (NASDAQ: PEP) is expected to announce quarterly earnings of $1.55 per share on revenue of $18.94 billion before the market opens. PepsiCo's shares closed at $154.85 on Wednesday, down by 0.6%. Meanwhile, J B Hunt Transport Services Inc (NASDAQ: JBHT) exceeded analyst expectations in the first quarter with earnings of $1.49 per share, beating the consensus estimate of $1.45. For further details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.
